---
title: "Assignment 5"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: library
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(plotly)

```

```{r}
#| label: load counties
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

us_counties.df <- st_read("USA_Counties/USA_Counties.shp") %>% janitor::clean_names()

```

# Task 1: USA Counties Data

```{r}
#| label: fig-KN-counties-under5
#| fig-cap: "Age Under 5 Population Estimate for KN Counties"

us_counties.df %>% 
  filter(state_name == "Kansas") %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = log(age_under5))) +
  labs(title = "Age Under 5 Population Estimate for KN Counties") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c("Age Under 5 (log)", option = "C") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
  

```


```{r}

```
